description: Phase3-B25f-opt: Change HTTP status from 200 to 422 (Unprocessable Entity) to stop the spinner. #376 showed WARNING_VISIBLE but spinner persisted. HTTP 4xx should trigger qwen3's error state and stop the spinner.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: Check: (1) Does warning text still appear? (2) Does the spinner STOP? (3) Does the error UI look cleaner? If spinner stops = Tier 1 upgrade. If warning disappears = rollback to 200.
services.notes: Only change: HTTP/1.1 200 OK → HTTP/1.1 422 Unprocessable Entity. Everything else same as #376.

notes: Optional improvement. If 422 causes warning to disappear, rollback to 200 and accept Tier 1.5.
